title: Ourokhome Rotary Cheese Grater Vegetable Slicer - Rotary Round Drum Grater Chopper with 3 Stainless Steel Drums Strong Suction Base (Black)
features: Free Your Hands: Make super easy and quick work of creating uniform spirals from fruits and vegetables for curly fries, salads,pasta within seconds.Save you a lot of time preparing dinner. The unique feeding port design prevents your hands from being hurt by the blade. Make the kitchen easy and fun.

Kitchen Necessity: For vegetable Julienne,Slicing and Grinding,all functions in one piece of equipment means more room in your kitchen cupboards without mess.3 interchangeable blades can satisfy you to cut food into the shape you want. It is very suitable for grinding cheese into powder, shredded carrots, and sliced potatoes. It is also suitable for cucumbers, zucchini, garlic, and even nuts.

Humanized Design: Reasonable drum-type rotating vegetable shredder has powerful suction feet for stability on your table.This makes it efficient and easy to operate! The parts can be easily disassembled, which makes the cleaning more convenient and simple. It also saves storage space and makes your kitchen cabinet less crowded.

Safe and Heavy Duty: 100% BPA-free food grade ABS plastic and 3 Sharp stainless steel blades ensure product longevity for everyday use.You can simply clean the rotary grater under running water, it is also dishwasher safe.
WARRANTY: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee and Wonderful after-sales customer support.
description: Product Description Your trusted partner 4 steps to install the cheese grater: lock the base to your countertop. Install the transparent barrel on the base. Insert the blade into the transparent barrel. Install the handle so that the handle is connected to the blade. Now you can create your own fun time with the cheese grater.
